# Staging site — keep it out of search indexes while in testing.
#
# AT PRODUCTION LAUNCH: replace the `Disallow: /` below with `Disallow:`
# (empty = allow all) so the site can be crawled.
User-agent: *
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://science.works/sitemap-index.xml
